about.title: Engineer passionate about frontend architecture and performance
about.p1: Senior Frontend Engineer with 9+ years of experience, including 5 years as a Technical Lead on high-stakes, business-critical projects.
about.p2: I have contributed to strategic applications for BPI France (Core Banking, Vault Core) and SNCF Voyageur (Railway Supervision), leading complex migrations and high-performance modular architectures.
about.p3: Specialized in Angular (v8 → v21), NgRx, RxJS, Signals Store and frontend architecture, I also support team growth around best practices: SOLID, TDD, and Clean Code.
about.journey_subtitle: From junior developer to Angular expert & technical lead in 9 years
